phaseflow-status.description: Show PhaseFlow project status — reads .phase files as canonical state, and plan.md for project metadata. Shows all phases, states, and next action.
phaseflow-status.template: Show the PhaseFlow project status. Read plan.md for the project name/goal/snapshot. Then read all .phase files from outputs/phase-*/.phase as the canonical state source. For each phase, also read phases/phase-X.md to get the phase name. Display a clear table with: number, name, type (from phase file header), state (from .phase file), and result (from outputs/phase-X/REVIEW.md verdict if it exists, or SUMMARY.md TL;DR). Highlight which phase is next: first in_progress (resume), then first pending (execute), then first completed (review), then first requires_fix (fix). If plan.md doesn't exist, say 'No PhaseFlow plan found in this project.'

phaseflow-refine.description: Refine a phase file — reads the phase, researches ambiguities, asks clarifying questions, and rewrites it with concrete, actionable prompts
phaseflow-refine.template:
You are improving a PhaseFlow phase file. Read the specified phase (e.g. phases/phase-1.md) and plan.md. Analyze it for vague tasks, missing inputs, ambiguous decisions, and gray areas. Ask the user targeted questions to clarify. Then rewrite the phase file with the resolved information.

Phase to refine: {{input}}

phaseflow-explorer.description: Codebase explorer. Investigates existing projects to identify the tech stack, patterns, file structure, and technical debt. Use BEFORE phaseflow-planner when the project already has code.

phaseflow-planner.description: Project planner. Analyzes requests and splits them into independent, self-contained phases. When the project has existing code, it analyzes the codebase to map relevant files into each phase. Asks clarifying questions when requirements are vague. NEVER executes tasks.

phaseflow-builder.description: Sequential phase executor. Reads plans generated by phaseflow-planner, executes pending phases one at a time, and persists all progress in files. 🔒 Pre-flight check: verifies previous phase is COMPLETED/REVIEWED before starting.

phaseflow-builder-visual.description: UI-specialized phase executor. Handles frontend, UI, and visual experience: CSS, React/Vue/Svelte components, responsive design, accessibility, and micro-interactions.

phaseflow-reviewer.description: Post-phase code auditor. Reviews each phase's deliverables for bugs, vulnerabilities, duplicated code, and plan deviations. Use AFTER each phase completed by phaseflow-builder.

phaseflow-orchestrator.description: Automated pipeline orchestrator. Reads plan.md, invokes phaseflow-builder/phaseflow-reviewer in a loop with fresh context each time, and stops when all phases reach a terminal state (REVIEWED, BLOCKED, ERROR). Use to run the full plan unattended.

phaseflow-refiner.description: Phase prompt engineer. Reads a phase-N.md file, identifies ambiguities and gray areas, asks clarifying questions, researches technologies, and rewrites the phase with concrete, actionable prompts.

phaseflow-doctor.description: Project diagnostician — validates phase structure, states, and file consistency. Read-only diagnostic by default; use with '--fix' argument to regenerate plan.md from canonical .phase files.
